requirements.title: VASL (Virtual Advanced Squad Leader) — VASSAL module
requirements.hint: Download VASL 6.7.3 (vasl-6.7.3.vmod) from vasl.info — that exact file is the version this game was validated against.

requirements.title: VASL board 3 (bd03)
requirements.hint: Download board bd03 from the VASL boards download at vasl.info (bd03.zip) — that exact file is the version this game was validated against.
